body.title: Fix queue_task node misfire on cc_queue.py mentions
body.result: Fixed two bugs: (1) queue_task tool in ops.py now guards against empty queue.json with content.strip() check before json.loads — prevents JSONDecodeError when file is empty. (2) Narrowed habit trigger in DB from 'cc queue' tokens (fired on any cc_queue.py mention) to explicit intent phrases. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Node 20260316142050372144 fires on any message containing cc_queue.py, tries to parse queue.json, errors with Expecting value line 1 column 1. Blocks training exercises involving ticket commands. Fix: narrow trigger to exclude bare cc_queue.py mentions, or suppress node and replace with cleaner implementation.
